name: Clean trigger — wiki-capture activates for end-of-session knowledge capture
query: We just finished debugging that cache-invalidation issue. Capture this session into my wiki before we wrap up.
expected_behavior: Read the setup bootstrap from references/setup.md before proceeding
Look for a per-session change manifest at /tmp/wiki-session-changes.*
Plan a session log under {folders.projects} using the schema's session-log page type
success_criteria: References the wiki-capture skill or /llm-wiki:wiki-capture command
Mentions reading ~/.config/llm-wiki/vault or running wiki-configure first
Plans to write a session log with Decisions, Findings, State, Next Steps sections
